productDisplayName: Fastrack Women Upgrades Analog White Red Watch
description: Sleek and stylish to the hilt, this fastrack analog wrist watch is a great buy for those who enjoy performance and style. With excellent touches and comfort, this watch makes for an excellent daily wear.Case diameter: 30 mmCase thickness: 5 mmDial shape: Rectangular Metallic case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Leather strap in red and grey for absolute style and comfort White dial with a stylish red band running above and below, brand name at 3 o& rsquo clock position, brand logo at the 12 o& rsquo clock position and 9 o& rsquo clock mentioned in number Quartz movement of time display Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Tang clasp to keep the watch firm in place as a belt buckle Water resistance at 30 meters, allowing you to use it even when swimming
